content.en:
The ruins of reincarnation.

Hurricane Sea.

This is a forbidden place in the ruins of reincarnation, but it is also a treasure land.

Ye Tian had been here before, but after his replica body approached here, he was directly shattered by a hurricane.

After that, he didn't explore the place.

But now, the hurricane of the Hurricane Collar has subsided and there is no danger.

Not only him, but many Origin Upper Realm Overlords have come here, and this is also a rare opportunity for them.

Basically, the time for the hurricane to subside is short, and it is necessary to take advantage of this opportunity to enter the hurricane sea.

......

Hurricane Sea.

Ye Tian and Yan Zu both came here, and although the hurricane sea had already subsided at this time, only the outer periphery had subsided, and the inner perimeter was still slowly subsiding, so they needed to wait for some days.

It hadn't been long since Ye Tiancai became the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and he knew the least about the Hurricane Sea.

He also received a message from Yan Zu, so he came over.

"Lord of Infinity, do you know about the Hurricane Sea?"

Yan Zu asked.

"I just came here, I only know that the hurricane sea is a forbidden land, but also a treasure land, and I have an opportunity, and I can only come in when the hurricane sea subsides. Ye Tian said truthfully.

Yan Zu introduced: "The hurricane sea is actually not a place where nature was born, but it is related to a great being. That great being was the founder of the Origin Ancestral Mountain, and he died here, and he died by impacting a higher realm. That one took the first path, and his cultivation was also the method of reincarnation of Haotian's body, and the body of reincarnation Haotian awakened nine times. Moreover, the strength has reached an incomparably terrifying level, even if it is the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has awakened eight times, he is an ant in front of this one. In the ancient times of the Eternal Lands, this is the one who has suppressed countless epochs. "

"If this one didn't hit the higher realm, he would still be an invincible existence now, all the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors were not his opponents, and he had created a lot of Origin Origin Ancestor Body Methods, and the inheritance on the Origin Ancestor Mountain was created by him. I estimate that he can't do anything about impacting a higher realm, so he left a legacy. As a result, he really failed, and the impact failed, and he died directly. "

"Nowadays, very few Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors know the name of this one, because it is too long, he is the Origin Ancestor, the name of the Origin Origin Realm is named by him, the Origin Ancestor is a real demon, if there is no him, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord This realm is estimated to need to be delayed for endless years before there is hope to develop it!"

"After the fall of the Origin Ancestor, his physical body sat here in the ruins of reincarnation. Although the Origin Ancestor has fallen, in fact, his physical body is a semi-breakthrough, and it has been a long time, and other Origin Upper Realm Overlords have no way to get close, and the physical body can even breathe, and the hurricane caused by breathing can kill other Origin Upper Realm Overlords in seconds. "

After that, after a long period of time, the hurricane sea was born, and the body of the ancestor turned into a treasure world, the entrance was his mouth, and it turned into an abyss, and the hurricane spit out from the abyss was his breath. "

Hearing this, Ye Tian was very shocked, and he also admired the Origin Ancestor very much.

He has the talent of copying, using the copying body, coupled with the experience of his predecessors, this has opened up the fourth path, and this Origin Ancestor started from scratch and created the path of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, which is far from comparable to what he is now.

Unless he opens up a new realm above the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm in the future, he will be qualified to match the merits of the Origin Ancestor.

In the midst of Yan Zu's chat, Ye Tian also knew what resources and treasures were here.

"Origin Blood Crystal!"

This is the blood of the Origin Ancestor, containing a special energy, belonging to the half-step transcendence of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord This realm of energy is born, it has a great effect, it can help the Origin Upper Realm Overlord to improve the physical body, if you take the path of awakening, if there are many Origin Blood Crystals, you can quickly ascend to the limit of the current realm.

For example, an Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened three times, refining the Origin Blood Crystal, can impact the Fourth Awakening faster, saving countless years of penance.

However, the Origin Blood Crystal is not always effective, if the number of awakenings is too large, the effect will become worse and worse, and for those Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have awakened more than five times, the Origin Blood Crystal is of little use.

In addition to the Origin Blood Crystal, there are many treasures.

If the blood gold is not extinguished, this is the bone of the original ancestor, which can be used to create extremely tough and powerful weapons, and even surpass the supreme treasure of the other side, and is called the supreme treasure of reincarnation.

This is also the only material that can be crafted into a treasure of reincarnation at present!

However, those ancient beings have taken away all those immortal blood gold, and now it is rare to find immortal blood gold, and it takes a lot of time to create a reincarnation treasure, and it requires a lot of strength.

Even, with the help of a flame, it can be refined, that is, the heart flame that is located in the corpse of the origin ancestor, and all the flames in the outside world cannot melt the inextinguishable blood gold.

In other words, not only do you need to find the Immortal Blood Gold here and gather a certain amount, but you also need to create a reincarnation treasure here.

But the time for each opening is so short, and it may not even be enough for a time, and when a certain amount of immortal blood gold is collected, you have to leave, wait for the next time you come in, and continue to collect immortal blood gold.

Of course, if you are not afraid of death, you can stay here.

However, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who did not leave never appeared again.

So, no one knows what the danger will be if you stay here, but it will definitely be death.

In addition to the Origin Blood Crystal and the Immortal Blood Gold, there are many beneficial resources that are unimaginable to the outside world.

It stands to reason that such a good place will definitely make all the Origin Upper Realm Overlords crazy, but everyone is very cautious and cautious, and they are also worried about danger.

There are some places that are enough for the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm to die, and everyone does not dare to trespass, almost always going to the places they know.

At this time, the map is very important, which area is safe, you can go to which area, if you don't know anything, it is easy to enter the area of death.

Like Ye Tian, he doesn't know anything, but he doesn't need to buy a trading map, and his copy body can be tested again and again.
